3140310.name: Exploding Kittens® 2: Beach Day Pack
3140310.description:
WHY VIDEO-GAME BEACH TRIPS ARE SUPERIOR TO REAL-LIFE BEACH TRIPS:

🏖️ NO RISK OF SAND HAUNTING YOUR EVERY CREVICE FOR YEARS TO COME

🌊 NO MYSTERY TOE-TICKLERS FROM THE DEEP

☀️ NO RISK OF SUNBURN. UNLESS YOU’RE PLAYING OUTSIDE

🥥 DRESS LIKE A COCONUT AND NO ONE CALLS THE COPS

🌴 DRESS LIKE A SEAGULL WITHOUT THE ALPHA SEAGULL STRIKING YOU DOWN AS A THREAT TO ITS THRONE

(There’s no seagull emoji, you know. Unbelievable…)

Now that we’ve convinced you of the merits of a video-game beach day, it’s time to be ENAMOURED by the contents of this EXPLODING KITTENS® 2 pack!

INCLUDES:

TWO NEW OUTFITS – Become the seagull you always wanted to be with the Sea Rat outfit, or embrace your inner coconut and dress in the Glenn Coco outfit.

PINEAPPLE-BASED EMOJI PACK – Finally, someone answered the call for more expressive fruits.

BEACH-READY CARD BACK AND LOCATION – And not a single grain of sand in your unmentionables!
3140310.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
